subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! We have made mention of thee with a remembrance whose fragrance shall never cease throughout the duration of the Kingdom and the Realm above. Bear thou witness to that which hath been witnessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی انا ذکرناک بذکر لاینقطع عرفه بدوام الملک و الملکوت ان اشهدی بما شهد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God
